title: manilkara multinervis subsp. sylvestris
intro: Manilkara multinervis subsp. sylvestris, also known as the Sylvestris Manilkara, is a subspecies of the Manilkara multinervis plant, a tropical species native to the Caribbean and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and protecting against infections. Herbal preparations of Manilkara multinervis subsp. sylvestris include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
